injuries.comment: Jiricek exited Sunday's (Dec. 14) game against the Bruins due to a lower-body injury, per Dylan Loucks of The Hockey News.
The Wild said that Johansson is OUT for Tuesday's (Dec. 16) game versus the Capitals.

The Wild said that Brodin is OUT for Tuesday's (Dec. 16) game versus the Capitals.
